name: Luma AI MCP
what_it_does: Luma AI MCP server enabling AI agents to use Luma Labs' generative AI capabilities — generating videos with Dream Machine (text-to-video and image-to-video), creating 3D assets from images using Luma's NeRF/3DGS technology, and integrating AI video and 3D generation into agent-driven creative workflows.
use_cases: Generating AI videos from text descriptions or images from creative content agents
Creating short video clips for presentations and social media from marketing agents
Generating 3D models from product images from e-commerce agents
Animating static images into video from creative workflow agents
Building video content pipelines with AI generation from media production agents
not_for: Long-form video production (Luma generates short clips, not full videos)
Teams needing precise video control or editing (this is generative, not editing)
High-volume video generation without checking API costs (video generation is expensive)
best_when: A creative agent needs to generate short AI videos or 3D assets — Luma's Dream Machine produces high-quality video with smooth motion compared to other text-to-video models.
avoid_when: You need long videos, precise motion control, or traditional video editing — use traditional video tools for those. For photorealistic images, use Stable Diffusion or DALL-E instead.

auth.notes: Luma AI API key required. Set LUMAAI_API_KEY environment variable. Get key from lumalabs.ai/dream-machine/api. Usage-based billing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free credits for new Luma accounts; limited video generations
pricing.paid_tiers: Video generation: ~$0.10-0.40 per second of video; 3D generation priced separately
pricing.notes: Video generation is expensive per second — a 5-second clip can cost $0.50-2.00. Monitor API usage carefully. Free credits available for new accounts.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; video generation is inherently slow (seconds to minutes)

known_agent_gotchas: Video generation takes 30 seconds to 2+ minutes — agents must implement long polling with timeouts
Cost per video clip is significant — implement hard budget limits before allowing agent generation
Video output is non-deterministic — results vary with same prompt
Video files are large — plan for storage and transfer of generated video outputs
Community MCP — may need updates as Luma API evolves
Luma has capacity limits — generation requests may queue during peak demand
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. API key. Luma US data center. Keep API key secure — video generation has real costs. Video content passes through Luma infrastructure. Content policy applies.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API key. Luma infrastructure. Video content passes through Luma. Protect API key — costly if leaked. Content policy applies to generated videos.
